title: salix humilior
intro: Salix humilior, also known as dwarf willow, is a small shrub-like deciduous plant native to Europe and Western Asia. Its bark, leaves, and roots possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Salix humilior include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Salix humilior can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
